title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: gdm, gnome-shell, and gsettings-desktop-schemas bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for gdm, is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The GNOME Display Manager (GDM) provides the graphical login screen. The screen is shown shortly after boot, after log out, and when switching the current user.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Gnome option to disable showing password on login/locl screen "disable-show-password" missing in RHEL9 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123139)  Gnome option to disable showing password on login/locl screen "disable-show-password" missing in RHEL9 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123140)  Regression in AllowMultipleSessionsPerUser  (JIRA:RHEL-109190)  Regression in AllowMultipleSessionsPerUser  (JIRA:RHEL-123357)
affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for gdm, is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The GNOME Display Manager (GDM) provides the graphical login screen. The screen is shown shortly after boot, after log out, and when switching the current user.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Gnome option to disable showing password on login/locl screen "disable-show-password" missing in RHEL9 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123139)  Gnome option to disable showing password on login/locl screen "disable-show-password" missing in RHEL9 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-123140)  Regression in AllowMultipleSessionsPerUser  (JIRA:RHEL-109190)  Regression in AllowMultipleSessionsPerUser  (JIRA:RHEL-123357)
